name: CircleCI
description: List project pipelines, retrieve individual pipeline details, and inspect the workflows and jobs produced by CircleCI runs.

auth.hint: Create a CircleCI personal API token and send it in the Circle-Token header. Personal tokens support API v2 and carry the user's read/write permissions.

tools.name: list_project_pipelines
tools.description: List pipelines for a CircleCI project.

params.name: project-slug
params.description: Project slug in vcs-slug/org-name/repo-name form; GitHub App and GitLab projects use circleci plus organization and project IDs.

params.name: branch
params.description: Filter pipelines by VCS branch name.

params.name: page-token
params.description: Token from next_page_token for the next page.

tools.name: get_pipeline
tools.description: Get one CircleCI pipeline by UUID.

tools.name: list_pipeline_workflows
tools.description: List workflows belonging to a CircleCI pipeline.

params.name: page-token
params.description: Token from next_page_token for the next page.

tools.name: list_workflow_jobs
tools.description: List jobs belonging to a CircleCI workflow.
